title: Movie Night
content: On Friday night, Ava invited two friends to her apartment for a movie night. They ordered pizza, made popcorn, and sat under warm blankets in the living room. It took them almost thirty minutes to choose a movie because everyone wanted something different. Finally, they picked a comedy film that made them laugh loudly several times. Outside, heavy rain hit the windows, but inside the apartment everything felt cozy and calm. After the movie ended, they stayed awake talking and eating snacks until very late at night.
